Laboratory Services Office

MENU

With the Laboratory Services Office, it is aimed to create a service infrastructure that will reinforce the university-industry connection by determining the laboratory facilities within Istanbul Okan University, enabling academics and students to easily access laboratory services, and listing the industrial services provided.
